10101010101100100011111011011111000100000011001100111001110001010010000001 - ASI: 29

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  000 = 0 * 00
  100 = 1 * 00
  101 = 1 * 01
  0101 = 01 * 01
  1001 = 100 * 1
  1111 = 11 * 11
  00001 = 000 * 01
  11100 = 11 * 100
  010100 = 0101 * 00
  1001000 = 1001 * 000
  1001100 = 1001 * 100
  1010101 = 101 * 0101
  1111000 = 1111 * 000
  1111101 = 1111 * 101
  10000001 = 100 * 00001
  1011111000 = 101 * 1111000
  01011001000 = 0101 * 1001000
  11100010100 = 11100 * 010100
  100110011100 = 1001100 * 11100
  11111011011111000 = 1111101 * 1011111000
  101010101011001000 = 1010101 * 01011001000
  1110001010010000001 = 11100010100 * 10000001
  10000001100110011100 = 10000001 * 100110011100
  10101010101100100011111011011111000 = 101010101011001000 * 11111011011111000
  100000011001100111001110001010010000001 = 10000001100110011100 * 1110001010010000001
  10101010101100100011111011011111000100000011001100111001110001010010000001 = 10101010101100100011111011011111000 * 100000011001100111001110001010010000001
